title: antidesma venosum subsp. membranaceum
intro: Antidesma venosum subsp. membranaceum is a subspecies of the Antidesma venosum plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antidesma venosum subsp. membranaceum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various health conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
